LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DANIEL A. SEROT, ESQ.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT DSL HOLDINGS, LLC IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. GIVEN THE PROXIMITY OF THE NEXT COURT DATE, COUNSEL SEROT MUST HAVE THE COURT'S ORDER GRANTING THIS MOTION PERSONALLY SERVED ON THE CLIENT DSL HOLDINGS WITHIN 24 HOURS OF THE COURT'S SIGNING THE ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Marta Weiss-Paul, Esq., and Jeremy Paul, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Karl Jurgenson.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Dan S. Lee and DSL Holdings, LLC, a CA limited liability company.
Plaintiff Karl Jurgenson sworn and examined on his own behalf.
Declaration of Karl Jurgenson and exhibits admitted in evidence by the court.
Court ordered defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Karl Jurgenson and against defendant Dan S. Lee and DSL Holdings, LLC.

Damages $169,703.55
Attorney's Fees $10,384.50
Costs $1,076.90
Total Judgment in the amount of $181,649.95
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2013 Set For Trial On Aug-12-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2012 Continued To Feb-13-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2012 Continued To Jan-02-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Continued To Nov-28-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Daniel A. Serot, Esq. of Van De Poel, Levy & Allen, Tel. 415.291.8844, counsel for defendant, and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling. Daniel A. Serot, Esq.'s MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT DSL HOLDINGS, LLC is granted. No opposition filed. Given the proximity of the next court date, Counsel Serot must have the court's order granting this motion personally served on the client DSL Holdings within 24 hours of the court's signing the order. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2012 Continued To Oct-30-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
